### Description

### Type of Change

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix
- [ ] ✨ New tool / feature
- [ ] ♻️ Refactor
- [ ] 📚 Documentation

### Testing

<!-- How did you test this? Include gauge IDs and expected outputs if relevant. -->

- [ ] `pytest python/tests/` passes
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes (if TypeScript changed)
- [ ] Manually tested with gauge `________` — output: ________

### Documentation

- [ ] `docs/tools/` updated (analysis.md / modelling.md / project.md / session.md as appropriate, plus the count in `docs/tools/index.md`)
- [ ] `python/mcp_server.py` tool docstring is clear and accurate
- [ ] No breaking changes to existing tool return schemas, OR migration notes added below

### Pre-flight Checklist

- [ ] PR is focused on a single concern (split larger changes)
- [ ] No API keys, credentials, or `.env` files committed
- [ ] `python setup_mcp.py --check` still shows all tools OK
